name: saas-core-api
description: Node.js saas-core-api with Express JWT authentication

scripts.build:api-win: npm run build:bundle && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && powershell -Command "Remove-Item sasscoreapi_win.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item (Get-Command node).Source sasscoreapi_win.exe" && npx postject sasscoreapi_win.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB sasscoreapi.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
scripts.build:api-lin: npm run build:bundle && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && cp $(command -v node) sasscoreapi_lin && npx postject sasscoreapi_lin NODE_SEA_BLOB sasscoreapi.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2 --overwrite && chmod +x sasscoreapi_lin
